subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Single, the One! We have made mention of thee aforetime with verses whereby the Concourse on High were enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد علیک بهاء الله الفرد الاحد انا ذکرناک من قبل بایات انجذبت بها الملا الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
